steps: In the first step, I'll refer to an image of software by using embed code retrieved from Box.
In this step, I'll use the Command component to tell the user to run a command. Copy spec data scp -rp username@login.projectName.uniName.edu:/spectrometername/username/directorypath/filename
In this step, I'll refer to some software by using the Software component. NMRBox https://github.com/NMRbox
creator: Abigail Elizabeth
